name: Coq Au Vin Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 8 Small White Onions (peel and cut a small cross in the root end of each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the white part of green onions only.
2. In a large frying pan, sauté bacon and chopped onion until the bacon is crisp. Transfer to the crockpot.
3. Wash chicken pieces; pat dry. Add them to the pan and season with salt and thyme. Brown on all sides. Transfer to the crockpot.
4. Peel small white onions and cut a small cross in the root end of each. Brown in remaining drippings, then transfer to the crockpot.
5. In the frying pan, pour in the dry red wine. Stir to loosen brown bits, add chicken stock, and stir until dissolved. Pour over the chicken.
6. Add minced garlic to the crockpot. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours.
7. Slice mushrooms and sauté in butter. Add them to the chicken.
8. When juices bubble, turn off heat. Stir together cornstarch and cold water until blended. Pour into the crockpot and stir until thickened.
9. Sprinkle with parsley before serving.
